product_overview: Sabueso is a sales workflow dashboard that centralizes bulk lead intake, AI-powered qualification and personalized outreach, and role-based access to lead workflows so teams can predictably convert leads into meetings.
core_goals: Import and consolidate lead lists so users can process large volumes of prospects from CSV files.
Automatically qualify and enrich leads using AI so users can prioritize high-value prospects.
Generate and edit personalized outreach drafts using AI and send outreach from the app.
Provide role-specific views so operators, SDRs and admins see the data and actions relevant to their role.
Surface lead-level context for handover to closers so meetings start with a rich lead profile.

features.name: Lead Management
features.description: Browse, filter and inspect the team's leads and see qualification status and lead details to decide next actions.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> View list of leads -> Filter leads by status -> Open a lead to see details -> Review qualification and enrichment data
Navigate to /dashboard -> View list of leads -> Sort or filter to a subset -> Open multiple lead profiles to triage and tag leads for outreach

features.name: CSV Lead Import
features.description: Bulk upload CSVs to create leads and companies, map columns to Sabueso fields, and see imported records in the dashboard.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> Start CSV import -> Select a CSV file -> Map columns and submit -> See imported leads appear in the lead list
Navigate to /dashboard -> Start CSV import -> Select a CSV file missing required columns -> See mapping validation error -> Adjust mapping or fix CSV -> Resubmit and see imported leads appear

features.name: AI Outreach
features.description: Generate AI-drafted outreach messages using lead enrichment, allow the user to edit those drafts, and send outreach from the app.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> Open a lead to view AI-generated draft -> Review AI-generated draft -> Edit draft content -> Send email -> See confirmation that outreach was sent
Navigate to /dashboard -> Open a lead to view AI-generated draft -> Reject or mark draft as inaccurate -> Edit draft to correct content -> Send email

features.name: User Profiles & RBAC
features.description: Collect profile and role information at onboarding and present role-specific dashboard views and permissions for Vendedores, Clientes, and Admins.
user_flows: Navigate to /onboarding -> Fill profile data (name, role, company) -> Submit profile setup -> Navigate to /dashboard -> See role-specific view and permitted actions
Navigate to /onboarding -> Attempt to submit with missing required profile fields -> See validation errors -> Provide missing fields -> Submit and access role-specific dashboard
